scripts.build: babel wwwroot --out-dir wwwroot-compiled --presets @babel/preset-react --extensions .js --no-babelrc --minified --ignore wwwroot/lib,wwwroot/globals.js && terser wwwroot-compiled/app.js wwwroot-compiled/animation/animation.js wwwroot-compiled/animation/dice3d.js wwwroot-compiled/components/*.js wwwroot-compiled/pages/*.js wwwroot-compiled/utils/*.js --compress --mangle --each --output .
